---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, console output, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- How are you running vPlaymat? [e.g. docker-compose.prod.yml, local dev, Render.com]
- vPlaymat version / commit: [e.g. `git rev-parse --short HEAD`]

## Additional context

Any other information that might help (deck format, game mode, etc.).
